items.title: JNJ Gets EU Nod for Imaavy in Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
items.description: J&J gains EU approval for Imaavy, the first FcRn blocker for adults and adolescents with generalized myasthenia gravis.

items.title: LifeStyles Healthcare Appoints Peter Luther to Board of Directors
items.description: LifeStyles Healthcare ("LifeStyles"), a global intimate health and wellness platform, and Linden Capital Partners portfolio company, is pleased to announce the appointment of Peter Luther to its Board of Directors.
